title: My menopausal brain fog, low mood and insomnia were debilitating. HRT didn't work for me - but this one treatment has restored my mind and memory and even cured my dry eyes
description: As a mum of three, the to-do list is as long as my arm, and I was forgetting half of it. I still wasn't sleeping well and, having been very sociable, I was cancelling and making excuses not to see people.
content:
Before I entered my early 40s, I wouldnt have described myself as an anxious person. My outlook was almost always positive and I could easily rationalise the few worries I did have.
But then I hit p… [+7568 chars]
de: Mein Gehirnnebel in den Wechseljahren, meine schlechte Laune und meine Schlaflosigkeit waren schwächend. Eine HRT hat bei mir nicht gewirkt – aber diese eine Behandlung hat meinen Geist und mein Gedächtnis wiederhergestellt und sogar meine trockenen Augen geheilt. Als Mutter von drei Kindern ist die To-Do-Liste so lang wie mein Arm und ich habe die Hälfte davon vergessen. Ich habe immer noch nicht gut geschlafen und da ich sehr kontaktfreudig war, habe ich abgesagt und Ausreden gefunden, um keine Leute zu sehen.
en: My menopausal brain fog, low mood and insomnia were debilitating. HRT didn't work for me - but this one treatment has restored my mind and memory and even cured my dry eyes. As a mum of three, the to-do list is as long as my arm, and I was forgetting half of it. I still wasn't sleeping well and, having been very sociable, I was cancelling and making excuses not to see people.
la: Mea menopausalis cerebrum nebula, humilis modus et insomnia sunt debilitata. HRT non laboravit mihi - sed haec una curatio mentem et memoriam meam restituit atque oculos etiam siccos sanavit. Ut mum de tribus, in to- do album, dum bracchium meum est, et oblitus sum dimidium eius. Ego adhuc non bene dormiebam et, cum valde sociabilis essem, delebam et excusabam homines ne viderem.
